- ☑ **MF-P0-08.01** -- `git init` at project root · `.gitignore` (models/, data/, runs/, logs/, datasets/, .env, mfwork) · `core.autocrlf=false`

    - Evidence: GitHub repo https://github.com/KevinSGarrett/MaskingUltimate verified existing (public, ADMIN); Actions permission enabled; origin configured; git push -u origin main succeeded on 2026-07-10.
- ☑ **MF-P0-08.03** -- Author `src\maskfactory\io\png_strict.py` — the ONLY mask writer (mode L, optimize=False, asserts values ⊆ {0,255} for gold paths, asserts dims) + built-in self-test
    - Evidence: src/maskfactory/io/png_strict.py = the ONLY mask writer (mode L / 8-bit / values{0,255} / exact dims / optimize=False compress_level=6; plus 16-bit label maps + grayscale ramp). python -m maskfactory.io.png_strict self-test ALL PASS 10/10 in maskfactory conda env.
- ☑ **MF-P0-08.04** -- Add lint/CI rule banning `cv2.imwrite` (and raw `Image.save`) for mask paths outside png_strict (pitfall 5 / QC-030 parity) · fixture violation fails CI
    - Evidence: tests/test_no_raw_mask_writers.py bans cv2.imwrite and raw .save outside io/png_strict (# png-strict: allow escape hatch); tree-scan test + fixture-catches-violation test both pass. CI runs pytest. 7 passed.
